nodes.title: COP operator display: unified battlespace picture
nodes.description: Incremental TDD roadmap for battlespace-manager Common Operational Picture: spatial map, temporal timeline, F2T2EA kill chain, attention/tasking workflow, and cross-tab navigation. Builds on /api/picture contract and battlespace-display Svelte tabs. Design ref: docs/DISPLAY-METRICS.md, o-my docs/F2T2EA_PLAN.md §cop-display. Migrated UX scope from o-my-sim display tickets (r2z, b98, x4d).

nodes.title: Phase 0: COP contract & test harness
nodes.description: Lock the operator picture contract before UI features. Red-green on API payloads and snapshot stability.

nodes.title: 0.1 Picture schema contract test (/api/picture)
nodes.description: TDD: failing test asserts required top-level keys (entities, threat_picture, mission_thread, attention_queue, fkcm_targets, timeline_view, task_rows) and types on a fixture snapshot from GulfWarEngine at T+15.
nodes.acceptance: pytest services/battlespace-display/api/tests/test_picture_contract.py passes; documents required fields in test docstring.

nodes.title: 0.2 scripts/run-display-tests.sh
nodes.description: Single entrypoint: API unit tests + optional web build. CI-friendly exit codes.
nodes.acceptance: ./scripts/run-display-tests.sh exits 0 from repo root.

nodes.title: 0.3 SSE /api/stream emits valid picture JSON
nodes.description: TDD: TestClient reads first SSE event; JSON parses and matches picture contract subset.
nodes.acceptance: test_stream_picture_event.py green.

nodes.title: Phase 1: Temporal COP (timeline)
nodes.description: Sim-time axis merging scenario beats + open tasks. Shipped baseline; harden with tests and sim-control parity.

nodes.title: 1.1 timeline_view builder unit tests (extend)
nodes.description: Extend test_timeline.py: task statuses (open/active/past), imminent window, sort order, upcoming_count cap.
nodes.acceptance: pytest test_timeline.py covers task + scenario merge edge cases.

nodes.title: 1.2 Timeline tab Playwright smoke
nodes.description: TDD: capture script or Playwright asserts Timeline tab renders NOW marker, filters, and ≥1 scenario card at T+22 fixture.
nodes.acceptance: scripts/capture-gulfwar-playwright.py includes timeline frame under docs/images/.

nodes.title: 1.3 Header Tasks stat → Timeline tab
nodes.description: Verify/fix Tasks stat click opens timeline (replaces o-my-sim-b98 Decisions-only behavior). TDD: component test or Playwright click assertion.
nodes.acceptance: Click Tasks stat → tab=timeline; active_tasks count visible in timeline subtitle.

nodes.title: 1.4 Timeline card click ↔ entity focus
nodes.description: TDD: timeline item with entity_id calls selectEntity and switches to map tab.
nodes.acceptance: Playwright or unit test for onItemClick wiring.

nodes.title: Phase 2: Spatial COP (map & tracks)
nodes.description: Battlespace map as authoritative spatial layer; tracks/sources tabs as drill-down.

nodes.title: 2.1 threat_picture header mapping tests
nodes.description: TDD: port/adapt o-my-sim test_attention_queue_display header mapping; active_tasks excludes ABORTED/EXECUTED.
nodes.acceptance: test_threat_picture_header.py green.

nodes.title: 2.2 Cross-tab entity selection contract
nodes.description: TDD: selecting entity from killchain/timeline/attention sets selectedEntityId and pans map.
nodes.acceptance: Documented selectEntity() behavior; test via App state harness or Playwright.

nodes.title: 2.3 Tracks panel fusion row contract test
nodes.description: TDD: fusion_rows entries have entity_id, source_feed, confidence; count matches picture contract.
nodes.acceptance: test_fusion_rows_contract.py passes.

nodes.title: Phase 3: F2T2EA kill chain COP
nodes.description: Mission thread phase rail ↔ kill chain grid/map sync (o-my-sim-x4d scope).

nodes.title: 3.1 Phase rail → Kill chain filter tests
nodes.description: TDD: mission_thread.phase_counts[Find] equals filtered fkcm_targets rows when phaseFilter=Find.
nodes.acceptance: test_killchain_phase_filter.py; Playwright phase click screenshot.

nodes.title: 3.2 URL deep links ?tab=killchain&phase=Find
nodes.description: TDD: load URL with query params; assert tab and phaseFilter initialized.
nodes.acceptance: Refresh with query restores filtered kill chain view.

nodes.title: 3.3 Kill chain map track history sync
nodes.description: TDD: selecting fkcm target draws track_history polyline; test track_history keys match entity_id.
nodes.acceptance: test_track_history_contract.py + manual map verify.

nodes.title: Phase 4: Attention & tasking workflow
nodes.description: Operator actions from attention rail: propose next F2T2EA step and assign coalition asset (o-my-sim-r2z).

nodes.title: 4.1 Candidate platform ranking API (TDD)
nodes.description: Red: POST /api/attention/{item_id}/candidates returns ranked platforms (distance, role, readiness). Green: wire task_allocator.select_best_platform from uci_common.
nodes.acceptance: test_attention_candidates.py with fixture platforms at T+15.

nodes.title: 4.2 POST /api/attention/assign action
nodes.description: TDD: assign platform to attention item task; updates task_rows and downgrades attention_queue entry.
nodes.acceptance: test_attention_assign.py; fkcm phase advances or task lifecycle updates.

nodes.title: 4.3 AttentionRail assign panel UI
nodes.description: Svelte panel: show next F2T2EA step + top-3 candidates + confirm. TDD: Playwright CUSTODY→assign at T+15.
nodes.acceptance: E2E assign flow green; item removed or downgraded in queue.

nodes.title: Phase 5: Decisions & advisor COP
nodes.description: Mission advisor suggestions, ISR assignments, decisions tab as deliberate-action surface.

nodes.title: 5.1 Advisor merge into attention_queue tests
nodes.description: TDD: merge_advisor_attention ordering; AGENT items route to decisions tab.
nodes.acceptance: test_advisor_attention_merge.py ported from o-my-sim.

nodes.title: 5.2 Decisions tab active-task filter from header
nodes.description: Optional shift-click Tasks stat → decisions with NEW/ASSIGNMENT filter (complements timeline nav).
nodes.acceptance: Documented in DISPLAY-METRICS; test or Playwright.

nodes.title: Phase 6: Assess & BDA layer
nodes.description: BDA items linked to kill chain assess phase and timeline past events.

nodes.title: 6.1 bda_items picture contract test
nodes.description: TDD: bda_items shape after engagement; links to fkcm target entity_id.
nodes.acceptance: test_bda_contract.py at post-engage fixture milestone.

nodes.title: 6.2 Assess tab ↔ kill chain Assess phase link
nodes.description: Click Assess phase rail → assess tab with BDA filter.
nodes.acceptance: Phase navigation parity with kill chain pattern.

nodes.title: Phase 7: Dual-display COP shell
nodes.description: entity-display (:8080) + battlespace-display (:8081) as complementary COP views with shared compat/version.

nodes.title: 7.1 Compat banner (o-my 0.2.0 tested-against)
nodes.description: TDD: both displays show compat/tested-against from compat/tested-against.json; warn on mismatch.
nodes.acceptance: test_compat_banner.py or snapshot.

nodes.title: 7.2 Cross-display deep links (entity id)
nodes.description: Document and test ?entity= deep link on battlespace; stub link from entity-display README.
nodes.acceptance: Opening :8081?entity=EID selects track when present.

nodes.title: Phase 8: E2E validation & operator docs
nodes.description: Walkthrough screenshots, COP operator guide, all phase tests green.

nodes.title: 8.1 Update O-MY-WALKTHROUGH with Timeline + COP flow
nodes.description: Regenerate screenshots; document operator path: attention → assign → timeline → assess.
nodes.acceptance: ./scripts/capture-o-my-walkthrough.sh produces updated frames.

nodes.title: 8.2 COP roadmap exit: run-display-tests.sh green
nodes.description: All phases 0–7 beads closed; CI runs display test harness.
nodes.acceptance: ./scripts/run-display-tests.sh green; bd blocked empty for cop epic subtree.
